since_last: 39% of 100 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.67%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 39% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.38% · BTC -1.17% · Gold -0.89% · Nasdaq100 -0.28%. 39% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.67%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.67%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.33%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at -7.46%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +2.04%, BIDU +1.98%, OKTA +1.75%, PUBM +1.45%, TTD +1.39%. Laggards: SKHY -7.46%, MU -5.61%, POWL -5.13%, TER -4.89%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.06% at $133.84
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.06% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
